commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc '
python3 - <<"PY"
import json, subprocess
raw = subprocess.check_output(["aws","s3","cp","s3://ch7-static-bkkelection2569/api-data/master-data/election-areas-bangkok.json","-"], text=True)
payload = json.loads(raw)
areas = payload.get("electionAreas") or []
print("AREAS_LEN=" + str(len(areas)))
if areas:
    first = areas[0]
    print("FIRST_KEYS=" + ",".join(sorted(first.keys())))
    for key in ["id","name","nameEn","number","areaNumber","districtCode","provinceCode"]:
        print(f"{key.upper()}={first.get(key)}")
PY'
